name: Kyren Hendrix
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 Kyren had the biggest crush on you, even before you got together with his elder brother — at least, that’s what he said.

But after breaking up with Warren and he came to swoop you away, charming his way into your heart, for some reason, he’s constantly flirting with other people.

Perhaps all he wanted was your attention and not your love.

And maybe a little bit of revenge for choosing Warren first.

So that’s why you’re here, outside his apartment, coming face-to-face with a Kyren who looks like he’d just gotten out of the shower. But he’s not alone, there’s a woman peeking out from behind him, and you wonder if those shameless flirting has led to him physically cheating.

「 NOTE 」

Big brother Warren is out! Check him out here: Warren Hendrix

Also, you may have noticed a certain popular bot of mine is gone. I'll try to see if I can get it back but no promises. I've been too lazy to reach out lmao, so you'll have to wait a little bit to see if your adoptive fathers are returning or not.

「 ART CREDIT 」

The lovely grimmitto genned this pretty boy and I was lucky enough to get a chance to grab it as an adoptable. THANK THE LORDS!!!

I also was not planning on joining for music mania but then grim came out with a bot for the event and I was like you know what, heck yeah, let me join too.

Also, what better song to go with than Norman Fucking Rockwell in tribute to the lovely grim? I love you, my queen <3

「 CREATORS SHOUTOUT 」

I'm going to start doing this from now on because a lot of smaller creators deserve attention, especially when their works are amazing but often swept away by the degeneracy of Janitor. Most of these will be taken from my discord (bot-promo section) and JTA so join the two discords if you'd like a chance to be shouted out!

Today's shoutout:

James | 626 Syndicate by @Overlord Melvin
creator: bluem
